meta.title: Proof — Privacy-first CV editor
meta.description: Generate your CV with any AI, proof it in a live editor, and export a flawless PDF. Your data never leaves the browser.

hero.tagline: Open schema · Any AI · Zero storage
hero.body: Download the open schema, drop it into ChatGPT, Claude or any model you like, then import the result. Proof it, style it, and export a flawless PDF — your data never leaves the browser.

aiBand.body: Most builders trap your data behind a form. Proof hands you an open schema and gets out of the way — use the AI you already trust.
aiBand.step1Body: One documented JSON file — the blueprint for a complete CV: identity, experience, skills, the lot.
aiBand.step2Body: Paste it into your AI of choice and describe yourself. No prompt to copy, no model lock-in. You own the conversation.
aiBand.step3Body: Drop the JSON back in. Pick a template, fine-tune, and compile to PDF — entirely on your device.

makeYours.body: A live editor with a real-time PDF preview. Reorder, restyle, and re-compile until every line sits exactly where you want it.
makeYours.feature1Body: Swap layouts instantly — more on the way.

privacy.body: Compilation runs in your browser via WebAssembly. No server, no database, no logs, no account. Your CV — and the AI conversation that made it — stay entirely with you.

openSource.body: Proof is open source. Fork it, add a template, bend the schema to your needs — it's yours. Not a coder? Tell us what's missing and we'll take a look.
openSource.requestSub: Tell us what you need — open an issue
openSource.supportSub: Keep Proof free, private, and ad-free

cta.body: Two minutes from blank page to a PDF you're proud of.

notFound.headline: This page didn't make the cut.
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist, was moved, or failed quality control. Let's get you back to something real.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Proof
onboarding.subtitle: A privacy-first CV editor. Your data is stored in this browser — nothing is saved server-side.
onboarding.step1Body: Use "+ New" to create a CV from the template, or "↑ Import" to load an existing JSON file. You can have multiple CVs and switch between them.
onboarding.step2Body: Select a template from the list. The middle panel lets you reorder sections, toggle page breaks, and adjust colors, fonts, and spacing.
onboarding.step3Body: Hit "Generate PDF" in the editor panel. Your CV is compiled with Typst and the PDF appears in the preview. Download whenever you're happy.
onboarding.sharedComputerNote: Data will be stored in session storage and cleared automatically when this tab closes.

editor.noCVsYet: No CVs yet — create or import one.
editor.clearDataConfirm: Delete all CV data stored in this browser? This cannot be undone.

pdfPreview.hitGenerate: Hit Generate PDF to preview your CV
pdfPreview.addYourCV: Add your CV to generate your own PDF

supportPrompt.supportBody: If it saved you time, consider supporting the project — it keeps development going.

terms.metaDescription: What Proof does and does not do with your data.
terms.title: Privacy & Terms
terms.subtitle: Plain English. No legalese.
terms.s1p1: Your CV data is stored exclusively in your browser's localStorage. It never leaves your device except during PDF generation (see below). We have no database, no user accounts, and no server-side storage of CV content.
terms.s1p2: If you clear your browser storage, your CV data is gone. There is no cloud backup. We recommend downloading your CV JSON periodically using the Download button in the editor.
terms.s2p1: When you click "Generate PDF", your CV data never leaves your device. The Typst compiler runs entirely in your browser as a WebAssembly module (~6 MB, downloaded once and cached). Compilation happens locally; no CV content is sent to any server at any point.
terms.s2p2: The only network requests are: loading the compiler itself (from this site), loading fonts (also from this site), and the analytics beacon described below. Your CV data is never included in any of these requests.
terms.s3p1: This site uses GoatCounter for basic traffic analytics. GoatCounter collects page views, referrer URLs, browser type, and country — no cookies, no fingerprinting, no personal data, no cross-site tracking.
terms.s3p2: GoatCounter is open source and its privacy policy is available at goatcounter.com/help/privacy.
terms.s4p1: Proof sets no cookies. Layout saves and CV data are stored in localStorage, which is not a cookie and is never transmitted to the server automatically. GoatCounter also sets no cookies.
terms.s5p1: Proof is open source. You are welcome to inspect the code, self-host it, or contribute. The source code is the most authoritative description of what the tool actually does.
terms.s6p1: If anything material changes — particularly around data handling — this page will be updated. The date below reflects the last revision.
